    • Actor-Partner Interdependence Model

  • Workshop

Summer School 2026

Dyadic Data Analysis Workshop

Conceptual foundations and an applied tutorial for analysing interdependent dyadic data with R.

Part I

Conceptual foundations

Why dyadic data require dyadic models, followed by visual introductions to the APIM, DIM, DSM, CFM, and exchangeability.

Open conceptual slides

Part II

In development

Applied tutorial

Data preparation, model fitting, interpretation, diagnostics, and exercises using R and dyadMLM.

Open applied slides

Developed for the 2026 Summer School at Charité – Universitätsmedizin Berlin.

Developed by Pascal Küng.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
